activeTasks.title: NQ Phase 3: Live signal engine — TradersPost → Tradovate → Lucid execution
activeTasks.note: Dispatched by pulse. Builds live trading harness: 1-min bar ingestion, ML inference per bar, TradersPost webhook on signal, position tracking, RTH session filter, systemd service nq-live-trader.service. Awaiting TradersPost webhook URL from Rob.
